modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help to install 7-Zip on Windows.

full_description_text: User want 7-Zip software. They say it not on computer. They need help to install it. User is on Windows.

description: User want 7-Zip software. They say it not on computer. They need help to install it. User is on Windows.
